title: Quick Question About Rei
wikitext:
[]: Quick Question About Rei Post by DEMOLITION D+ » Sun Sep 20, 2009 4:11 pm Why was her AT Field starting to break down (when her arm fell off) towards the end of Air? And if it's because of the Anti-AT Field produced by the Mass Produced Evas... Then why isn't everyone elses arms falling off?

[]: Post by Legendary » Sun Sep 20, 2009 4:17 pm People suspect it's because she wasn't taking her pills.

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Sep 20, 2009 5:57 pm Because she's not a normal human perhaps?

[]: Post by MatrixRefugee » Sun Sep 20, 2009 6:23 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Because she's not a normal human perhaps?

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Sep 20, 2009 7:18 pm Something tells me they wouldn't play well with each other. So not well that if left unchecked, shit would just fall apart.

[]: Post by Orphan Of Darkness » Sun Sep 20, 2009 8:40 pm I like to think its because of her proximity to Adam (Gendo's hand)

[]: Post by DEMOLITION D+ » Sun Sep 20, 2009 9:11 pm Haha, okay dicks, that's all I wanted to know. Guess it makes sense

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Sep 20, 2009 10:19 pm DEMOLITION D+ wrote: Haha, okay dicks
